rulings.Case Title: COMMUNITY HOUSING PARTNERSHIP VS. CHARLES BYRD et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Further Responses To Special Interrogatories
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, January 8, 2015, Line 7: DEFENDANT CHARLES BYRD'S Motion To Compel Further Responses To Special Interrogatories. DENIED. Moving party fails to cite any authority for the proposition that termination in violation contract and law is a defense in unlawful detainer action and therefore is within the scope of discovery. No sanctions. =(501/REQ)
